item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 4min Some great memories and experience for Antoni Kowalski, but it's a 10-4 loss to Mark Willi
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 4min Some great memories and experience for Antoni Kowalski, but it's a 10-4 loss to Mark Williams.
Did his work in the qualifiers really. Hopefully kick on next season.
V tough one to call MJW vs Hawk in the second round. Although Williams up 20-7 on head-to-head in all comps. 2 122

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 8min Bayern Munich clinched their 35th league title today, beating Stuttgart 4-2.
I sti
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 8min Bayern Munich clinched their 35th league title today, beating Stuttgart 4-2.
I still haven't quite got my head around former Burnley boss Vincent Kompany having such a brilliant team under his command.
Bayern also have German Cup and European Cup semi-finals to come. 90

item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 10min It looks like Xiao Guodong v Zhou Yuelong could be on for a late finish here.
And
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 10min It looks like Xiao Guodong v Zhou Yuelong could be on for a late finish here.
And when I say a late finish... 1 7 150

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 11min THE FINAL!
Ross Smith takes on Gerwyn Price in the final of #ET5, as the pair will batt
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 11min THE FINAL!
Ross Smith takes on Gerwyn Price in the final of #ET5, as the pair will battle it out to be crowned the 2026 Elten Safety Shoes European Darts Grand Prix champion!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 1 1 34 5 mil

item.title: EPSBofficial: Matt reposteó English Partnership for Snooker and Billiards @EPSBofficial · 1h ABBAS DEFENDS UNDER-14 CROWN Hove's Adam
item.description: Matt reposteó English Partnership for Snooker and Billiards @EPSBofficial · 1h ABBAS DEFENDS UNDER-14 CROWN Hove's Adam Abbas has become only the third player ever to successfully defend the PowerGlide Cues English Under-14 Championship crown following a dramatic 4-3 victory against Jack Wilding in the final today. He follows in… http:// dlvr.it/TS6jS5 1 2 192
